intentSynonyms: make a new comment in confluence
open a new comment in confluence
add a footer comment or reply to a comment in confluence
description: Add a footer comment to a Confluence page, or reply to an existing comment. To create a new top-level comment, provide page_id. To reply to an existing footer comment, provide parent_comment_id instead. The comment body uses storage format (HTML).

page_id.description: Page ID to comment on — required for new top-level comments, omit when replying

parent_comment_id.description: Parent footer comment ID to reply to — omit for new top-level comments

body.description:
Comment body in storage format (HTML) — e.g., "

Great work!

"
